name: The Great Gatsby
aiSummary: A classic American novel exploring the decadence and excess of the Jazz Age through the eyes of Nick Carraway and his mysterious neighbor Jay Gatsby.

name: Clean Code
aiSummary: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship that teaches developers how to write clean, maintainable code.

name: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
aiSummary: An exploration of how Homo sapiens came to dominate the world, examining our history from the Stone Age to the modern era.

name: The Pragmatic Programmer
aiSummary: A guide to becoming a more effective and productive programmer, covering practical techniques and philosophies.
A dystopian novel about totalitarian surveillance and thought control in a future society.
